column1: sssom_version='1.0' mapping_set_id='http://example.org/mappings/cmt-confOf' mapping_set_version='2026-03-16' mapping_set_title='CMT to ConfOf alignment' mapping_set_description='Lexical and semantic alignment between the CMT ontology and the ConfOf ontology based on labels, comments, and local structure.' creator_id='orcid:0000-0000-0000-0000' license='https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/' subject_source='cmt:Ontology' object_source='confOf:Ontology' subject_source_version='unknown' object_source_version='unknown' subject_type=<EntityType.owl_class: 'owl:Class'> object_type=<EntityType.owl_class: 'owl:Class'> mappings=[MappingRow(record_id='ex:m1', subject_id='cmt:Administrator', object_id='confOf:Administrator', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_class: 'owl:equivalentClass'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.99, comment='Both ontologies define a class labeled Administrator with the same lexical form and compatible meaning as an administrative person in the conference system.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m2', subject_id='cmt:Author', object_id='confOf:Author', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_class: 'owl:equivalentClass'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.99, comment='Exact lexical match on Author; both represent persons who write/submit conference contributions.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m3', subject_id='cmt:Conference', object_id='confOf:Conference', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.78, comment='Exact label match, but the modeled semantics differ: in CMT Conference is the conference entity, while in ConfOf Conference is a subclass of Working_event, closer to the conference event itself rather than the management object.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m4', subject_id='cmt:Person', object_id='confOf:Person', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_class: 'owl:equivalentClass'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.95, comment='Exact lexical match on Person with broadly compatible semantics in both ontologies.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m5', subject_id='cmt:Paper', object_id='confOf:Paper', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.84, comment='Exact lexical match on Paper; both denote a paper contribution, though CMT models Paper as a Document and ConfOf as a Contribution subtype.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m6', subject_id='cmt:Reviewer', object_id='confOf:Member_PC', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.background_knowledge_based_matching: 'semapv:BackgroundKnowledgeBasedMatching'>, confidence=0.72, comment='ConfOf Member_PC is commented as Reviewer and structurally reviews contributions, making it a close semantic counterpart to CMT Reviewer, though Member_PC is specifically a PC member.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m7', subject_id='cmt:ProgramCommitteeMember', object_id='confOf:Member_PC', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.86, comment='Both classes denote program committee members involved in reviewing; ConfOf Member_PC has reviewing and expertise restrictions consistent with CMT ProgramCommitteeMember.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m8', subject_id='cmt:ProgramCommitteeChair', object_id='confOf:Chair_PC', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_class: 'owl:equivalentClass'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:LexicalSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.93, comment='ProgramCommitteeChair and Chair_PC are near-synonymous labels for the chair of the program committee, with highly compatible intended meaning.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m9', subject_id='cmt:SubjectArea', object_id='confOf:Topic', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.81, comment='CMT SubjectArea and ConfOf Topic both represent thematic subject matter used to classify papers/contributions.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m10', subject_id='cmt:PaperAbstract', object_id='confOf:Contribution', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_broad_match: 'skos:broadMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.55, comment='CMT PaperAbstract is a kind of Paper document, while ConfOf Contribution is a broader contribution concept encompassing papers and other submission types; the object is broader than the subject.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m11', subject_id='cmt:ConferenceChair', object_id='confOf:Chair_PC', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.background_knowledge_based_matching: 'semapv:BackgroundKnowledgeBasedMatching'>, confidence=0.58, comment='Both denote chair roles in conference organization, but CMT ConferenceChair is not clearly identical to ConfOf Chair_PC, which is specifically the PC chair.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m12', subject_id='cmt:Document', object_id='confOf:Contribution', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.63, comment='CMT Document includes paper and review artifacts, while ConfOf Contribution includes paper-like submissions; they overlap substantially but are not equivalent.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m13', subject_id='cmt:Co-author', object_id='confOf:Author', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.rdfs_subclass_of: 'rdfs:subClassOf'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.logical_reasoning: 'semapv:LogicalReasoning'>, confidence=0.9, comment='In CMT, Co-author is explicitly a subclass of Author. ConfOf has Author but no separate Co-author class, so CMT Co-author is reasonably modeled as a subclass of ConfOf Author.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m14', subject_id='cmt:email', object_id='confOf:hasEmail', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_property: 'owl:equivalentProperty'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:LexicalSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.96, comment='Both datatype properties associate a Person with an email string; labels differ only by naming convention.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m15', subject_id='cmt:name', object_id='confOf:hasTitle', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_related_match: 'skos:relatedMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.34, comment='Both are naming/title properties, but domains differ strongly: CMT name applies to Conference or Person, while ConfOf hasTitle applies to Contribution. This is only a weak related match.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m16', subject_id='cmt:title', object_id='confOf:hasTitle', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_property: 'owl:equivalentProperty'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:LexicalSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.97, comment='Both datatype properties capture the title of a paper/contribution and have compatible ranges and intended usage.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m17', subject_id='cmt:abstract', object_id='confOf:abstract', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_property: 'owl:equivalentProperty'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.lexical_matching: 'semapv:LexicalMatching'>, confidence=0.98, comment='Both datatype properties named abstract denote the abstract text of a submission/contribution.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m18', subject_id='cmt:hasAuthor', object_id='confOf:writtenBy', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.88, comment='Both object properties link a paper/contribution to its author. The labels differ, but domains and ranges are closely aligned.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m19', subject_id='cmt:writePaper', object_id='confOf:writes', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.owl_equivalent_property: 'owl:equivalentProperty'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.semantic_similarity_threshold_matching: 'semapv:SemanticSimilarityThresholdMatching'>, confidence=0.94, comment='Both properties relate an Author to a Paper/Contribution they wrote, and both are inverse to the corresponding paper-to-author property.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m20', subject_id='cmt:hasSubjectArea', object_id='confOf:dealsWith', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_close_match: 'skos:closeMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.structural_matching: 'semapv:StructuralMatching'>, confidence=0.83, comment='Both properties connect a paper/contribution to its thematic area or topic; the structural role in each ontology is closely similar.'), MappingRow(record_id='ex:m21', subject_id='cmt:acceptedBy', object_id='confOf:Reviewing_results_event', predicate_id=<MappingPredicate.skos_related_match: 'skos:relatedMatch'>, mapping_justification=<SemaPVJustification.background_knowledge_based_matching: 'semapv:BackgroundKnowledgeBasedMatching'>, confidence=0.22, comment='CMT acceptedBy is an object property linking a paper to an administrator, whereas ConfOf Reviewing_results_event is an event class about review outcomes. They are only loosely related through acceptance workflow and are not directly equivalent.')]
